revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Nosubst|The markup provided will be confusing to many editors, and as this template provides documentation for itself, there is little justification for substitution.}} {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Clear|{{Template shortcut|-||Clr}}}} == Description == This template makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. It is often used to prevent text from flowing next to unrelated images. == Usage == * {{tlx|clear}} — adds <div style="clear:both;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|left}} — adds <div style="clear:left;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|right}} — adds <div style="clear:right;"></div> For technical details, see [[Template talk:Clear|the discussion in the talk page]]. == Examples ==
=== Example without {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}} ==== New section without the template before ==== Without the code {{tlc|clear}}, this section starts at the right of the image. {{clear}}
=== Example that uses {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}}
'''{{tnull|clear}}''' {{clear}} ==== New section with the template before ==== Here the code {{tlc|clear}} is placed before this section, so it appears below the image.
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. Often used to stop text from flowing next to unrelated images, so text will appear on a full width line under the image.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Side", "description": "Can be 'right' or 'left' so content is delayed until just the right or left column is complete. The default clears both columns.", "type": "line", "required": false, "suggestedvalues": [ "right", "left", "both" ], "default": "both" } }, "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{tl|Clear left}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear right}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear2}} (derived from this template) * {{tl|Break}} * {{tl|Float}} * {{tl|Stack}} {{sandbox other|| }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]] }} \n

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Nosubst|The markup provided will be confusing to many editors, and as this template provides documentation for itself, there is little justification for substitution.}} {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Clear|{{Template shortcut|-||Clr}}}} == Description == This template makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. It is often used to prevent text from flowing next to unrelated images. == Usage == * {{tlx|clear}} — adds <div style="clear:both;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|left}} — adds <div style="clear:left;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|right}} — adds <div style="clear:right;"></div> For technical details, see [[Template talk:Clear|the discussion in the talk page]]. == Examples ==
=== Example without {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}} ==== New section without the template before ==== Without the code {{tlc|clear}}, this section starts at the right of the image. {{clear}}
=== Example that uses {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}}
'''{{tnull|clear}}''' {{clear}} ==== New section with the template before ==== Here the code {{tlc|clear}} is placed before this section, so it appears below the image.
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. Often used to stop text from flowing next to unrelated images, so text will appear on a full width line under the image.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Side", "description": "Can be 'right' or 'left' so content is delayed until just the right or left column is complete. The default clears both columns.", "type": "line", "required": false, "suggestedvalues": [ "right", "left", "both" ], "default": "both" } }, "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{tl|Clear left}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear right}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear2}} (derived from this template) * {{tl|Break}} * {{tl|Float}} * {{tl|Stack}} {{sandbox other|| }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Line-handling templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]] }} \n

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Wikipedia XHTML tag-replacing templates]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Nosubst|The markup provided will be confusing to many editors, and as this template provides documentation for itself, there is little justification for substitution.}} {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Clear|{{Template shortcut|-||Clr}}}} == Description == This template makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. It is often used to prevent text from flowing next to unrelated images. == Usage == * {{tlx|clear}} — adds <div style="clear:both;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|left}} — adds <div style="clear:left;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|right}} — adds <div style="clear:right;"></div> For technical details, see [[Template talk:Clear|the discussion in the talk page]]. == Examples ==
=== Example without {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}} ==== New section without the template before ==== Without the code {{tlc|clear}}, this section starts at the right of the image. {{clear}}
=== Example that uses {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}}
'''{{tnull|clear}}''' {{clear}} ==== New section with the template before ==== Here the code {{tlc|clear}} is placed before this section, so it appears below the image.
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. Often used to stop text from flowing next to unrelated images, so text will appear on a full width line under the image.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Side", "description": "Can be 'right' or 'left' so content is delayed until just the right or left column is complete. The default clears both columns.", "type": "line", "required": false, "suggestedvalues": [ "right", "left", "both" ], "default": "both" } }, "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{tl|Clear left}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear right}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear2}} (derived from this template) * {{tl|Break}} * {{tl|Float}} * {{tl|Stack}} {{sandbox other|| }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Line-handling templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Nosubst|The markup provided will be confusing to many editors, and as this template provides documentation for itself, there is little justification for substitution.}} {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Clear|{{Template shortcut|-||Clr}}}} == Description == This template makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. It is often used to prevent text from flowing next to unrelated images. == Usage == * {{tlx|clear}} — adds <div style="clear:both;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|left}} — adds <div style="clear:left;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|right}} — adds <div style="clear:right;"></div> For technical details, see [[Template talk:Clear|the discussion in the talk page]]. == Examples ==
=== Example without {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}} ==== New section without the template before ==== Without the code {{tlc|clear}}, this section starts at the right of the image. {{clear}}
=== Example that uses {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}}
'''{{tnull|clear}}''' {{clear}} ==== New section with the template before ==== Here the code {{tlc|clear}} is placed before this section, so it appears below the image.
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. Often used to stop text from flowing next to unrelated images, so text will appear on a full width line under the image.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Side", "description": "Can be 'right' or 'left' so content is delayed until just the right or left column is complete. The default clears both columns.", "type": "line", "required": false, "suggestedvalues": [ "right", "left", "both" ], "default": "both" } }, "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{tl|Clear left}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear right}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear2}} (derived from this template) * {{tl|Break}} * {{tl|Float}} * {{tl|Stack}} {{sandbox other|| }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Line-handling templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Clear%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Nosubst|The markup provided will be confusing to many editors, and as this template provides documentation for itself, there is little justification for substitution.}} {{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:Clear|{{Template shortcut|-||Clr}}}} == Description == This template makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. It is often used to prevent text from flowing next to unrelated images. == Usage == * {{tlx|clear}} — adds <div style="clear:both;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|left}} — adds <div style="clear:left;"></div> * {{tlx|clear|right}} — adds <div style="clear:right;"></div> For technical details, see [[Template talk:Clear|the discussion in the talk page]]. == Examples ==
=== Example without {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}} ==== New section without the template before ==== Without the code {{tlc|clear}}, this section starts at the right of the image. {{clear}}
=== Example that uses {{tlf|clear}} === [[File:HeidelbergTun.jpg|200px|left]] {{Lorem ipsum span|max len=123}}
'''{{tnull|clear}}''' {{clear}} ==== New section with the template before ==== Here the code {{tlc|clear}} is placed before this section, so it appears below the image.
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Makes content wait until existing content is completed in all columns. Often used to stop text from flowing next to unrelated images, so text will appear on a full width line under the image.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Side", "description": "Can be 'right' or 'left' so content is delayed until just the right or left column is complete. The default clears both columns.", "type": "line", "required": false, "suggestedvalues": [ "right", "left", "both" ], "default": "both" } }, "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{tl|Clear left}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear right}} (implemented using this template) * {{tl|Clear2}} (derived from this template) * {{tl|Break}} * {{tl|Float}} * {{tl|Stack}} {{sandbox other|| }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Line-handling templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
